1x1.description: An elbow-shaped cable exiting the left and top edges.

1x2.description: A tee-shaped cable connected to the top, bottom, and right edges.

1x3.description: A vertical straight cable exits through the top and bottom edges.

2x1.description: A straight cable connects the left and right edges.

2x2.description: A T-shaped cable exits at left, right, and bottom edges.

2x3.description: A tee shape connecting left, right, and bottom edges.

3x1.description: A tee-shaped cable connects to the top, bottom, and left edges.

3x2.description: An elbow-shaped cable connecting the left and top edges.

3x3.description: An elbow cable exits at the top and right edges.
